entry.title: Cognition's SWE-1.7 Strips Chinese AI Bias From Open-Source Code Models
entry.summary: Cognition's SWE-1.7 strips CCP bias from a Chinese open-source base model and matches US frontier labs on trustworthiness evals, at a fraction of the cost.

entry.title: Google's SensorFM Beats 34 of 35 Health Tasks Trained on a Trillion Minutes
entry.summary: Google's SensorFM is trained on 1 trillion minutes of Fitbit and Pixel Watch data from 5 million people, transferring across 35 health prediction tasks with no task-specific architecture

entry.title: OpenAI's ChatGPT Work and GPT-5.6 Turn AI Into a Full-Time Employee
entry.summary: OpenAI's ChatGPT Work agent, powered by GPT-5.6, can run multi-hour workflows across Slack, Drive, and Salesforce â turning a single prompt into finished deliverables

entry.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Splits Into Three Models and Beats Every Rival
entry.summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 family â Sol, Terra, and Luna â launches publicly with a new multi-agent Ultra mode, a 1.5M-token context window, and frontier benchmarks at lower cost than Claude Fable 5.

entry.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol Beats the AI Benchmark Every Other Model Scored Zero On
entry.summary: GPT-5.6 Sol becomes the first frontier model to beat an ARC-AGI-3 game, cracking a benchmark that had every AI at 0%

entry.title: xAI's Grok 4.5 Hits Frontier-Level Agent Work at 86% Less Cost
entry.summary: Grok 4.5 tops the AA-Briefcase agentic benchmark among non-Anthropic models, delivering near-Opus performance at 86% lower cost and half the time

entry.title: Artificial Analysis Reveals Top AI Agents Fail Half of Real Office Tasks
entry.summary: Artificial Analysis launches an independent leaderboard for ServiceNow's enterprise agent benchmark, where even the best model only clears 51% of tasks

entry.title: Manus Ships Branch to Let AI Agents Fork Sessions Without Losing Context
entry.summary: Manus's new Branch feature lets you fork any agent session mid-task, preserving full context so one research thread can become many parallel deliverables.

entry.title: Anthropic Ships Reflect, a Dashboard That Coaches You on Smarter Claude Usage
entry.summary: Anthropic launches Reflect, a Spotify Wrapped-style dashboard that shows how you use Claude and nudges you to log off

entry.title: Perplexity Ships GLM 5.2 Orchestrator That Matches Claude Opus at One-Third the Cost
entry.summary: Perplexity post-trains GLM 5.2 as a cheaper orchestrator for Computer, hitting near-frontier performance at 34% of Claude Opus cost

entry.title: Meta's Muse Spark 1.1 Opens a Public API to Challenge OpenAI and Anthropic
entry.summary: Meta Superintelligence Labs releases Muse Spark 1.1, a multimodal agentic model with a 1M-token context, now accessible via the new Meta Model API at $1.25/$4.25 per million tokens.

entry.title: xAI's Grok 4.5 Tops SaaS Automation Benchmark at a Quarter the Cost
entry.summary: Grok 4.5 tops Artificial Analysis's AutomationBench-AA with a 51% score, completing more SaaS workflow objectives than any rival at one-quarter the cost per task.
